note: Baseline version - Previous best before v11
measurement_method: scikit-image SSIM, target=cat_photo.jpg resized to 800x800, output=SVG rendered at 800x800 via cairosvg
CRITICAL: SSIM values for string art are inherently low (0.15-0.25) because string art cannot perfectly reproduce photos. Do NOT compare to SSIM thresholds designed for photo compression (0.9+). A 5% improvement in SSIM (e.g. 0.196 -> 0.206) is SIGNIFICANT for string art.
